heading: Tuesday Night
text: Becoming cloudy. Chance of rain showers, mainly north; with freezing rain likely in the St. Lawrence Valley, and patchy elsewhere from Route 2 northward. Lows in the low to mid 30s north, and mid 30s to around 40 south. Winds becoming light and variable, except becoming northeast 5 to 10 mph in the St. Lawrence Valley.

heading: Wednesday
text: from the northeast in areas near and north of Route 2, elsewhere from the southeast.

heading: Scattered rain showers, except freezing rain likely in the immediate St. Lawrence Valley, otherwise patchy early, from Route 2 northward. Highs from the upper 40s to mid 50s, some 60s from Bennington south and west. Winds 10 to 15 mph, and gusting to 25 mph
text: from the northeast in areas near and north of Route 2, elsewhere from the southeast.

heading: Wednesday Night
text: Rain showers tapering off west to east, possibly as some flurries in the St. Lawrence Valley and northern NY late. Temperatures rising early, and falling late, with lows from the mid 30s to lower 40s, except mid 20s to around 30 in far northern New York. South winds 10 to 15 mph, gusting to 30 mph, shifting to the southwest late.
